launched_by: Government of India - Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Landholding farmer families across India, subject to exclusion criteria in scheme guidelines
benefit_summary: Direct income support transferred to eligible farmer families in three equal installments each year
benefit_amount: INR 6000 per year
documents_required: Aadhaar, bank account, land records, mobile number
how_to_apply: Register through the PM-KISAN portal or the local agriculture/revenue office for state verification

launched_by: Government of India - Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers with insurable interest
benefit_summary: Crop insurance against yield loss from non-preventable natural risks and localized calamities
benefit_amount: Farmer premium generally 2% for Kharif food and oilseed crops, 1.5% for Rabi food and oilseed crops, and 5% for annual commercial or horticultural crops
documents_required: Aadhaar, bank account, land or tenancy proof, sowing certificate where required, crop details
how_to_apply: Apply through the National Crop Insurance Portal, bank branch, CSC, or insurance intermediary before the notified cutoff date

launched_by: Government of India - Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Small and marginal landholding farmers aged 18 to 40 years with cultivable land up to 2 hectares
benefit_summary: Voluntary contributory pension with matching central government contribution
benefit_amount: Minimum assured pension of INR 3000 per month after age 60
documents_required: Aadhaar, bank account, land record, mobile number, age proof
how_to_apply: Enroll at the PM-KMY portal or Common Service Centre; PM-KISAN beneficiaries may authorize contribution from PM-KISAN benefits

launched_by: Reserve Bank of India and Department of Financial Services
target_farmers: Farmers, tenant farmers, oral lessees, sharecroppers, self-help groups, joint liability groups, and allied activity farmers needing crop or working-capital credit
benefit_summary: Flexible short-term credit for crop production, post-harvest needs, consumption needs, farm assets, animal husbandry and fisheries working capital
benefit_amount: Short-term crop loans up to INR 3 lakh are eligible for concessional interest benefits subject to current MISS rules
documents_required: Identity proof, address proof, land or tenancy details, crop pattern, bank account, photographs
how_to_apply: Apply at a commercial bank, cooperative bank, regional rural bank, or through Kisan Rin/KCC campaign channels

launched_by: Government of India - Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: All farmers seeking soil nutrient testing and crop-wise fertilizer recommendations
benefit_summary: Soil testing and soil health card with recommendations for nutrients, amendments and balanced fertilizer use
benefit_amount: Soil testing and advisory service; no direct cash transfer to farmer
documents_required: Farmer identity, land details, soil sample details, mobile number
how_to_apply: Contact the District Agriculture Office or use the Soil Health Card portal where state services are enabled

launched_by: Government of India - Ministry of Jal Shakti and Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Farmers and communities needing irrigation coverage, water-use efficiency, micro-irrigation, watershed development, or water source creation
benefit_summary: Support for irrigation expansion, Har Khet Ko Pani, watershed development, and Per Drop More Crop interventions
benefit_amount: Subsidy and project assistance vary by component and state annual action plan
documents_required: Land records, Aadhaar, bank details, irrigation project estimate, farmer registration
how_to_apply: Apply through the State Agriculture/Horticulture Department under approved PMKSY components

launched_by: Government of India - Small Farmers Agribusiness Consortium
target_farmers: Farmers, FPOs, traders and commission agents linked to regulated APMC mandis onboarded to eNAM
benefit_summary: Online trading, price discovery, quality assaying support, and transparent settlement through integrated mandis
benefit_amount: Market-access service; payment depends on actual sale transaction
documents_required: Farmer identity, bank account, mobile number, mandi registration details
how_to_apply: Register as a farmer or FPO through an eNAM mandi, mobile app, or the eNAM portal

launched_by: Government of India - Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Farmers, FPOs, PACS, SHGs, JLGs, agri-entrepreneurs, startups, cooperatives, APMCs and eligible public-private projects creating post-harvest or community farm assets
benefit_summary: Medium to long-term debt financing support for post-harvest infrastructure and community farming assets
benefit_amount: 3% interest subvention per annum on loans up to INR 2 crore per project for up to 7 years, plus credit guarantee support where eligible
documents_required: Aadhaar or entity documents, DPR, land or lease proof, bank details, project cost estimate, quotations
how_to_apply: Register and apply online on the AIF portal with a detailed project report and chosen lending institution

launched_by: Government of India - Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Farmers adopting cluster-based organic or natural farming with PGS certification support
benefit_summary: Financial assistance for organic inputs, certification, capacity building, value addition and marketing in approved clusters
benefit_amount: Assistance norms have included up to INR 50000 per hectare for 3 years under earlier PKVY and revised support through approved organic clusters
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, group or cluster details, crop details
how_to_apply: Apply through State Agriculture Department, local agriculture extension office, or approved organic farming cluster

scheme_name: MIDH (Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture)
launched_by: Government of India - Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Farmers and entrepreneurs growing or investing in fruits, vegetables, roots and tubers, mushrooms, spices, flowers, aromatic plants, coconut, cashew or cocoa
benefit_summary: Assistance for horticulture area expansion, protected cultivation, planting material, nurseries, water resources, post-harvest management and processing
benefit_amount: Subsidy varies by component; common assistance norms include 40% to 50% for many farmer components with higher norms for eligible regions/components
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, bank details, project estimate, crop plan, quotations
how_to_apply: Apply through the State Horticulture Mission or the State Department of Horticulture

launched_by: Government of India - Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Farmers and farmer institutions covered under state-approved agriculture and allied sector projects based on district and state plans
benefit_summary: State-flexible support for agriculture and allied sector development, infrastructure, innovation, value chains and farmer-centric projects
benefit_amount: Benefit depends on approved state project and component norms
documents_required: Aadhaar, land or activity proof, bank account, project-specific documents
how_to_apply: Apply through the relevant State Agriculture, Horticulture, Animal Husbandry or allied department when the state opens the component

launched_by: Government of India - Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying
target_farmers: Individuals, FPOs, SHGs, JLGs, companies and cooperatives establishing eligible poultry, sheep, goat, piggery, fodder or breed-development units
benefit_summary: Entrepreneurship and breed-development support for poultry, sheep, goat, piggery, fodder and feed infrastructure
benefit_amount: 50% capital subsidy with component-wise ceilings, commonly up to INR 25 lakh for poultry and up to INR 50 lakh for sheep/goat or eligible fodder units
documents_required: Aadhaar or entity documents, DPR, land or lease proof, bank sanction, training or experience details where required
how_to_apply: Apply online through the NLM Udyamimitra portal and route the proposal through the State Implementing Agency and bank

scheme_name: National Food Security and Nutrition Mission (NFSNM/NFSM)
launched_by: Government of India - Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Farmers in approved districts and clusters growing rice, wheat, pulses, coarse cereals, nutri-cereals and eligible commercial crops under state action plans
benefit_summary: Demonstrations, seed support, improved practices, farm machinery and extension for raising foodgrain and nutrition-crop productivity
benefit_amount: Benefit varies by crop component and state annual action plan
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, crop details, farmer registration
how_to_apply: Apply through local Agriculture Department offices when demonstrations, seed distribution or component applications are opened

launched_by: Government of India - Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Farmers in rainfed and climate-vulnerable areas adopting integrated farming systems, water-use efficiency, soil health management and resource conservation practices
benefit_summary: Support for climate-resilient agriculture, integrated farming, rainfed area development, soil health and resource conservation
benefit_amount: Component-wise assistance through state annual action plans; no single fixed cash amount
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, activity plan, local agriculture office recommendation
how_to_apply: Apply through the State Agriculture Department or district agriculture office under NMSA/RAD components

launched_by: Government of India - Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
target_farmers: Small, marginal, women, SC/ST and other farmers, groups, entrepreneurs and institutions needing farm machinery, custom hiring centres or machinery banks
benefit_summary: Subsidy support for farm machinery, equipment, custom hiring centres, hi-tech hubs and mechanization access
benefit_amount: Assistance varies by machine and category; many individual equipment norms support 40% to 50% subsidy and higher support for some group/custom-hiring components
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, caste certificate if applicable, bank details, quotation, farmer registration
how_to_apply: Apply through the DBT in Agriculture Mechanization portal or the State Agriculture Department

scheme_name: HP Prakritik Kheti Khushhal Kisan Yojana (Natural Farming Mission)
launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Agriculture
target_farmers: Farmers and horticulturists in Himachal Pradesh adopting chemical-free natural farming practices
benefit_summary: Training, certification support and subsidies for natural farming inputs, indigenous cow purchase, drum purchase and cow-shed floor/urine collection infrastructure
benefit_amount: Support includes up to INR 2250 for drums, up to INR 8000 for cow urine collection pit/cow-shed flooring, and 50% subsidy up to INR 25000 for an indigenous cow plus transport support as per state norms
documents_required: Aadhaar, Himachal farmer registration, land details, bank account, natural farming registration details
how_to_apply: Apply through the HP Agriculture Department, local extension office, or the SPNF/CETARA natural farming system

scheme_name: Mukhyamantri Khet Sanrakshan Yojana (Crop Protection Fencing Subsidy)
launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Agriculture
target_farmers: Himachal Pradesh farmers needing crop protection from wild animals, stray animals and monkeys through approved fencing systems
benefit_summary: Subsidy for solar-powered fencing, interlink chain fencing, solar-interlinked chain fencing and barbed wire fencing under current HP crop protection guidelines
benefit_amount: Current HP Agriculture information notes 70% subsidy since 2023-24 for approved fencing types
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, field map, estimate, farmer registration
how_to_apply: Apply through the local Agriculture Development Officer or HP Agriculture scheme portal after site verification

launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Horticulture
target_farmers: Himachal Pradesh horticulture growers seeking quality planting material, inputs, area expansion, post-harvest support or orchard development
benefit_summary: Subsidy and technical support for horticulture inputs, planting material, orchards, post-harvest handling and allied horticulture activities
benefit_amount: Component-wise subsidy through HP Horticulture Development Scheme, MIDH, RKVY and approved state norms
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, orchard details, quotations, photographs where required
how_to_apply: Register on eUdyan and apply under the relevant Horticulture Development Scheme service

launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Horticulture
target_farmers: Himachal Pradesh farmers, orchardists and trainees interested in beekeeping or pollination support
benefit_summary: Training, improved bee colonies with hives, and pollination support services for horticulture and farm productivity
benefit_amount: Training stipend/service support and bee colony/hive assistance as per Department of Horticulture norms
documents_required: Aadhaar, farmer registration, bank account, training application, local horticulture office recommendation
how_to_apply: Apply through eUdyan or the nearest Horticulture Development Officer/bee-keeping service centre

launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Agriculture and Department of Horticulture
target_farmers: Himachal Pradesh farmers adopting protected cultivation of vegetables, flowers and high-value horticulture crops
benefit_summary: Subsidy support for polyhouse, greenhouse, protected cultivation and renovation components under HP and MIDH-aligned schemes
benefit_amount: Subsidy depends on current state/MIDH component; HP protected cultivation has historically provided high capital support with current component-specific approvals
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, project estimate, polyhouse layout, quotations
how_to_apply: Apply through HP Agriculture/Horticulture offices or eUdyan protected cultivation services before construction

launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Agriculture
target_farmers: Himachal Pradesh farmers and communities needing wells, shallow wells, irrigation structures, micro-irrigation or small water harvesting support
benefit_summary: Assistance for flow irrigation, borewells/shallow wells, community water works, PMKSY-linked irrigation and water-use efficiency
benefit_amount: Flow Irrigation Scheme provides 100% support for approved community works and 50% subsidy for individual borewells/shallow wells; other components follow PMKSY/state norms
documents_required: Aadhaar, land records, bank account, water source details, estimate, community resolution if applicable
how_to_apply: Apply through the local Agriculture Department office or HP Agriculture scheme portal after technical feasibility check

launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Agriculture
target_farmers: Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe farmers in Himachal Pradesh purchasing approved farm machinery or equipment
benefit_summary: Higher-category assistance for approved agricultural machinery such as power tillers, weeders, reapers, rotavators and other farm equipment
benefit_amount: HP Agriculture notes 50% subsidy for SC, ST, small, marginal and women farmers under mechanization norms, compared with 40% for other farmers
documents_required: Aadhaar, caste certificate, land records, bank account, quotation, farmer registration
how_to_apply: Apply through the DBT agriculture mechanization process or HP Agriculture Department office

launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Agriculture
target_farmers: Himachal Pradesh farmers purchasing approved seeds of cereals, pulses, oilseeds, fodder crops, potato, ginger or turmeric
benefit_summary: Subsidized seeds and input support to increase crop productivity under Mukhyamantri Krishi Samvardhan Yojana components
benefit_amount: 50% subsidy on seeds of cereals, pulses, oilseeds and fodder crops; 25% subsidy on potato, ginger and turmeric seed as per HP Agriculture information
documents_required: Aadhaar, farmer registration, land/crop details, bank account where subsidy is DBT-linked
how_to_apply: Apply through agriculture extension offices, approved distribution centres, or HP Agriculture scheme channels during seed distribution windows

scheme_name: HP Sheep and Goat Rearing Subsidy
launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Animal Husbandry
target_farmers: Himachal Pradesh farmers and rural households, with preference to unemployed SC/ST, women and eligible general category persons, seeking goat or small-ruminant livelihood units
benefit_summary: Subsidized goat units and small-ruminant livelihood support for income generation and meat production
benefit_amount: Krishak Bakri Palan Yojna provides goat units on 60% subsidy for eligible beneficiaries
documents_required: Aadhaar, Himachal residence proof, income certificate, bank account, shed availability proof, application verified by Veterinary Officer
how_to_apply: Apply through the Veterinary Officer or HP Animal Husbandry DBT portal for Krishak Bakri Palan Yojna

launched_by: Government of Himachal Pradesh - Department of Horticulture
target_farmers: Himachal Pradesh farmers and trained growers interested in mushroom cultivation, compost supply and grower registration
benefit_summary: Training, grower registration, pasteurized compost supply, spawn support and transport support for mushroom cultivation
benefit_amount: Departmental norms include 10-day training support, free grower registration, compost subsidy for eligible categories and transport support up to road head near farm
documents_required: Aadhaar, farmer registration, training details, bank account, mushroom grower registration form
how_to_apply: Apply through eUdyan mushroom services or the nearest HP Horticulture mushroom development office
